what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for an image asset in the design-source channel, identifying deck1-2026/p-11, its blob reference, MIME type, source, author session, and creation timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, address, channel, path, blob URI, mime type, name, and dimensions
Width and height are both set to 0
The source field is 'design_source_material' and the body labels it 'SOURCE design ground-truth'
standouts: Dimensions are recorded as 0x0 despite being an image record
The file is a stub/source-ground-truth marker rather than a descriptive asset page
Blob reference is the only content-addressed pointer to the actual image data
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a fixed ledger schema
References assets via image:// and blob:// URIs
Records provenance fields: source, author_session, created
Keeps an empty links array for future relationships
concerns: w and h are 0, suggesting dimensions were not extracted or the record is incomplete
links is empty, so no relationships to other files or symbols are captured
No alt text, caption, or visual description is provided
mime says image/jpeg but no verification or size metadata is present
notes: A minimal, addressable metadata stub for a design-source image that points to a blob but lacks dimensions, links, and descriptive content.
questions: What visual content does deck1-2026/p-11.jpg actually contain?
Why are the width and height zero instead of measured values?
What other files or deck pages is this image expected to relate to?
Is the author_session a human or an automated ingestion process?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record source design ground-truth for an image, and the file does serve as an asset metadata record; however, the zero dimensions and empty links make it more of a placeholder than a fully populated ground-truth entry.
intention_signals: The file appears to be registering a specific image from a design deck as canonical source material so it can be addressed, attributed, and linked later in a channel memory system.
novelty: The record is unusually sparse for an image ledger entry: dimensions are unset and relationships are absent, making it a placeholder rather than a rich asset description.
contribution: It contributes a stable, addressable metadata record that links a named design-source image to its blob and creation context, which a fused system could retain as a provenance anchor.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata stub for the design-source image deck1-2026/p-11.jpg, referencing blob b2:a120f8e9cfeb7521414c2a7064d00e5e with zero dimensions and no links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog a design deck image as source ground-truth within the channel-memory ledger.
